summary: Backend API testing completed for BEG Estates Iteration 2. All 28 tests passed covering HD project seed, English status keys, privacy (admin-only fields stripped), buyers collection, status_history, zero-deposit limits, and role enforcement.
critical_code_review_comments: Privacy implementation correct: public endpoints strip buyer_id, admin_notes, negotiated_price, source_ref, final_contract_price
Hidden status (501) correctly excluded from public property lists and returns 404 on direct access
Staff can see all 29 properties including hidden, with full admin fields and buyer details
English status keys working: available, reserved_zero_deposit, reserved_paid_deposit, sold, compensation, unavailable, hidden
Zero-deposit limit (2 per client) enforced correctly with Bulgarian error message
Release reservation correctly sets property back to 'available' (English key)
Buyers collection (3 seeded) accessible only to staff, returns 401 for unauthenticated
OTP is returned in response body as dev_otp (MOCKED - intentional for scaffold)
seed_data_creation: HD project 'BEG Estates / Хаджи Димитър' seeded with slug=hadzhi-dimitar, is_primary=true, 29 total units (18 apts, 1 shop, 6 parking, 1 garage, 3 storage). Яна exists with status=planned, is_primary=false. 3 buyers seeded. Apt 202 has active zero-deposit by Ivan. Apt 102 reserved_paid_deposit (Николай Костов). Apt 301 sold. Apt 401 compensation. Apt 501 hidden.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly with new English status keys. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_beg_estates_v2.py covers all major flows. OTP email is MOCKED - returns dev_otp in response. Public endpoints correctly strip admin-only fields and hide hidden status properties.

mocked_apis.email_otp: OTP is returned in API response as dev_otp instead of being emailed - intentional for scaffold/testing

verified_features: Seed migration: HD project created with slug=hadzhi-dimitar, is_primary=true, 29 total inventory units
Seed migration: Яна exists with status=planned, is_primary=false
Public: GET /api/projects returns 2 projects, HD first (is_primary=true)
Public: HD stats include total=28, available, sold=1, reserved=2, compensation=1
Public: GET /api/projects/{hd_id}/properties returns 28 items (excludes hidden 501)
Public: Properties have no buyer_id/admin_notes/negotiated_price/source_ref/final_contract_price
Public: GET /api/properties/{hidden_id} returns 404
Public: GET /api/projects/{hd_id} returns nearby_amenities array of 4 items
Staff: GET /api/projects/{hd_id}/properties returns 29 properties including hidden 501
Staff: GET /api/properties/{apt_102_id} returns admin fields and buyer details (Николай Костов)
Staff: GET /api/buyers returns 3 seeded buyers
Staff: GET /api/property-statuses returns 7 entries (english->Bulgarian)
Status change: PATCH /api/properties/{id}/status updates property, invalid status returns 400
Zero-deposit: reserving sold/compensation/hidden property returns 409
Zero-deposit: Ivan has seeded active zero on apt 202
Zero-deposit: limit=2 enforced, third returns 409 with 'лимит' message
Release: POST /api/reservations/{id}/release flips property back to 'available'
Admin dashboard: GET /api/dashboard/admin returns kpi with all required keys
Client dashboard: GET /api/dashboard/client returns reservations (1+), installments (3), documents
Role enforcement: client accessing /api/dashboard/admin → 403
Role enforcement: client accessing /api/buyers → 403
Role enforcement: unauthenticated accessing /api/buyers → 401
